heading: Inapplicability of the Act of State doctrine
label: 15 Inapplicability of the Act of State doctrine
text: Enforcement of arbitral agreements, confirmation of arbitral awards, and execution upon judgments based on orders confirming such awards shall not be refused on the basis of the Act of State doctrine.
notes: CodificationAnother was renumbered .section 15 of this titlesection 16 of this title
